fixture: 058_write_nullability

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE widgets (id INTEGER NOT NULL, code VARCHAR(12))
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (code) VALUES ('x')
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 23502] at 1:1 (offset 0): INSERT omits required column "id"

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets DEFAULT VALUES
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 23502] at 1:1 (offset 0): DEFAULT VALUES has no value for required column "id"

statement 4:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO widgets (id, code) VALUES (1, 'x')
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 5:
  sql:
    UPDATE widgets SET id = NULL
  result:
    error
    diagnostics:
      [0] ERROR [SQLSTATE 23502] at 1:25 (offset 24): null value in column "id" violates NOT NULL constraint
